name: python3-mechanize
title: python3-mechanize
description:
stateful programmatic web browsing
A library for browsing the web in Python. Mechanize acts like a browser
allowing you to do web scraping, functional testing of web sites and
things no one has thought of yet.
.
Among other things, mechanize:
* Follows links
* Fills in HTML forms
* Automatically observes robots.txt
* Has a browser history
.
It was modelled after the Perl module WWW::Mechanize.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-mechanize because stateful programmatic web browsing.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-mechanize as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-mechanize with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-mechanize --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
